title: NEHU – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NEHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) has released a recruitment notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post for candidates with M.E./M.Tech., MCA, or M.Sc. qualifications in relevant fields, and candidates can apply through email mode until 30-05-2026 at nehu.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in BME/IT/CSE/ECE/EE/AI/ML, MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science/Electronics or Allied Areas related to Medical Image Processing and Deep Learning

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEHU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: North-Eastern Hill University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026
